Name: Back To Life
Notes: Most low quality recording of SSC probably ever, at only 40kbps. Metronome peaks throughout the entire performance, this recording is basically unlistenable. Interpolates "Back To Life" by Soul II Soul.

Name: Brothers
Notes: Sunday Service rehearsal of "Brothers".

Name:
Elastic Heart
(Lift Up Your Voices)
Notes: Interpolates "Elastic Heart" by Sia. Later version released on their album Jesus Is Born, as "Lift Up Your Voices".

Name:
Eternal Life [V1]
(Lost In The World)
Notes:
OG Filename: Sunday Service - Week 21_Stereo Mic Ref_11__Eternal Life
Official live recording of "Eternal Life" from the show in Cody, Wyoming. Cover of "Lost In The World".

Name:
Eternal Life [V2]
(Lost In The World)
Notes: Longer performance of the above song.

Name: Eternal Life [V3]
Notes: Eternal life had a BMI entry filed before Jesus Is Born released, suggesting a studio recording was done for the album but wasn't ultimately included. Unknown if this version was a cover of "Lost In The World", "Can't Tell Me Nothing", or a new song entirely.

Name: Father I Stretch
Notes: Interpolates "Father I Stretch My Hands" by Pastor T. L. Barrett.

Name: Follow Me / Fade
Notes: Leaked in huge pile of Sunday Service Choir leaks on November 19th, 2021. Interpolates "Fade" by Kanye West, Post Malone & Ty Dolla $ign, and "Follow Me" by Aly-Us. Later released on the Sunday Service Choir's album Jesus Is Born as "Follow Me - Faith".

Name: Halo
Notes: Interpolates "Halo" by Beyonce.

Name: Higher Ground
Notes: Part of a leaked zip included as a bonus for the "THIRSTY" groupbuy.

Name: How Excellent
Notes: Covers "How Excellent" by Walt Whitman and the Soul Children of Chicago. Released as "Excellent" on the Sunday Service Choir's album Jesus Is Born.

Name: Paradise
Notes: Early version of the Sunday Service Choir's "Paradise", interpolates "Paradise" by Jeremih

Name:
Rain
(feat. Band)
Notes: Sunday Service choir rehearsal of their song "Rain". Leaked in huge pile of Sunday Service Choir leaks on November 19th, 2021.

Name: Revelation 19:1
Notes: Early version of the Sunday Service Choir's cover of "Revolution 19:1" by The New Jerusalem Baptist Church Choir, which would later further develop and become a track on their album Jesus Is Born.

Name:
Souls Anchored
(So Anxious)
Notes: Interpolates "So Anxious" by Ginuwine. Later version appears on their album Jesus Is Born.

Name: The Good Lord Works
Notes: Sunday Service Choir cover of "Stand On The Word" by The Joubert Singers. Later version appears on their album Jesus Is Born as "That's How The Good Lord Works".

Name: Weak
Notes: Leaked in huge pile of Sunday Service Choir leaks on November 19th, 2021. Interpolates "Weak" by SWV. Later version released on their album Jesus Is Born.

Name:
We On A New Level
(New Level)
Notes: Interpolates "New Level" by A$AP Ferg.

Name: You Brought The Sunshine
Notes: Covers "You Brought The Sunshine" by the Clark Sisters, and interpolates a riff from "Master Blaster (Jammin')" by Stevie Wonder. Later version appears on their album Jesus Is Born.

Name:
Amazing / Otis
[Yandhi]
Notes: Voice memo of rehearsals for covers of "Amazing" & "Otis". Leaked by isaac.blue on August 10, 2021.

Name:
Angel
[Yandhi]
Notes: Leaked in huge pile of Sunday Service Choir leaks on November 19th, 2021.

Name:
Blackbird
(feat. Francs and the Lights)
[Yandhi]
Notes: Sunday Service Choir cover of  "Blackbird" by The Beatles exists. Ending is heard at the beginning of the recording for "Real Love".

Dressed In Black
[Yandhi]
Notes: Sunday Service Choir cover of "Dressed In Black" by Sia.

Name:
We Have Everything We Need
(Everything We Need)
[Yandhi]
Notes: Voice memo of an early "Everything We Need" rehearsal leaked.

Feel The Love / Living In Vain / You Brought The Sunshine
[Yandhi]

Follow Me / Love's The Key

Forgiven

Never Too Much

Real Love
[Yandhi]

Say You Love Me
[Yandhi]
Notes: Part of a leaked zip included as a bonus for the "THIRSTY" groupbuy.

Name:
Closed On Sunday (Reprise)
(feat. Kanye West)
[JESUS IS KING]
Notes: Live or possibly studio recording of a Sunday Service Choir rendition of "Closed On Sunday", apparently labeled as a reprise in the song file. Kanye raps his verse. It sounds like the back half of the Sunday Service vocals may have been reused for the SSC backing vocals in the music video version of "Closed On Sunday" but this is unconfirmed. New snippet leaked 7/27/24.

[JESUS IS KING]

Don't Give Up

CDQ Sunday Service version of "Don't Give Up".

(feat. Soul II Soul) (prod. Kanye West)
[Donda 2]
Notes: A mix of Soul II Soul's "Back To Life", combined with the Sunday Service Choir's cover of the same song. This mix was created by Kanye West, and made for Kate Moss. This track was broadcasted live on Desert Island Discs radio. Starts at 4:12, faded in over the radio host's dialogue.
